---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  Firm IBTECH, position DW Data Insights Intern, year 2026

2.  Firm Garanti BBVA, Regulatory Reporrting Intern, year 2025

# Projects
1. Türkiye Electricity Demand Forecasting
2. Machine Learning Based Invesment and Maintenance Optimization

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, SQL

# Hobbies
Reading, playing guitar & piano
